items.title: New York becomes first US state to suspend data centre development

items.title: Ukraine targets Russian shipping in ‘unprecedented’ drone assault

items.title: Washington and Tehran send warnings by missile
items.description: The foes are in their most dangerous period of fighting since a fragile April truce. Many of their strikes are designed to send signals

items.title: Democrats are not in great shape
items.description: A fractious opposition is doing everything it can to spurn an open goal
